name: agentdashpulse
description: AI Agent Management Dashboard — monitor and manage Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and other AI agent sessions
author: Ying Liu

scripts.cleanup: node -e "const net=require('net');const s=net.createServer();s.once('error',()=>{const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const pid=execSync('netstat -ano|findstr :3456|findstr LISTEN',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim().split(/\s+/).pop();execSync('taskkill /F /PID '+pid);console.log('Killed process '+pid+' on port 3456')}catch{console.log('Could not kill process on port 3456')}});s.once('listening',()=>{s.close();console.log('Port 3456 is free')});s.listen(3456)"
